contact-send-us-message-and-we-will-repl: Send us a message — we'll get back to you in no time.
contact.name: Name
contact.we-received-your-message: Thanks! We've received your message and will be in touch shortly.
features.bau-sender-description: Our Umrah AI Agent applies for Umrah visas through the Bab Al-Umrah system, automatically sending traveller information to Saudi Arabia visa sites. Skip hours of manual data entry. Photos are automatically resized to match official requirements. Work offline — prepare traveller data ahead of time. Avoid last-minute stress and costly errors.
features.complete-software: HAJonSoft provides intelligent AI Agents that automatically send traveller information to Saudi Arabia visa systems. Our active AI Agents cover Umrah, Hajj, Visit Visa, Nusuk, and Passport Scanning — streamlining visa applications through advanced passport intelligence and automated browser submission. We can also build custom agents such as Rawda workflows and other specialized agents as needed.
features.ehaj-integration-description: Our eHaj AI Agent submits Hajj visa applications to the Saudi Arabia eHaj system with one streamlined process. Eliminate repetitive tasks like package creation. The AI Agent automatically adjusts photo dimensions before upload. Prepare data offline months in advance. No delays. No mistakes.
features.manage-effortlessly: AI Agents for Saudi Arabia visa workflows.
features.quality-passport-reader-descrip: Our Passport Scanning AI Agent reads passport data directly from passport images, including Arabic names and birthplace fields with high accuracy. Unlike ordinary hardware readers, it does more than MRZ extraction by reading both the MRZ and the visual area of the passport page.
features.sell-description: Sell your travel packages 24/7 through Dove — a customizable online storefront hosted on your domain. Dove lets travelers reserve packages and securely submit passport details and personal photos with ease.
features.wtu-sender-description: Our Umrah AI Agent automates visa submissions through the Masar platform, sending traveller information directly to Saudi Arabia visa sites. It handles passport data entry, photo uploads, and form submissions — saving your team hours of repetitive manual work every season.
features.gma-sender-description: Our Visit Visa AI Agent processes Saudi Arabia visit visa applications through automated form filling and document submission. It sends traveller information directly to the Saudi visa portal — ideal for agencies handling business, family, or tourist visas at scale.
features.twf-sender-description: Nusuk AI Agent automates Hajj registration for travel agencies by sending traveller data directly to Saudi Arabia's Nusuk platform. We also build custom agents like Rawda and continuously monitor Saudi systems to keep agents current.
footer.tagline: 4 AI Agents for Saudi Arabia Visa Processing
footer.description: HAJonSoft provides 4 intelligent AI Agents for travel agencies and visa processing centers worldwide. Our AI Agents automatically send traveller information to Saudi Arabia visa sites — covering Umrah, Hajj, Visit Visa, and Nusuk.
get-started.more-than-software: 4 AI Agents for Saudi Arabia Visa Processing
get-started.we-are-team: Intelligent AI Agents that automatically send traveller information to Saudi Arabia visa sites — automating Umrah, Hajj, Visit Visa, and Nusuk applications with zero manual effort.
pricing.basic-learn-more: Includes a 1GB database and 5GB for storing passport and photo data. Comes with dedicated sales and admin portals. Lifetime software updates included. This is a one-time, non-refundable purchase required to activate the software.
pricing.lifetime-learn-more: Enjoy full support for Hajj and Umrah for 15 years. We'll process your visa applications daily and ensure seamless operations for your agency, including troubleshooting and expert support.
pricing.season-support-haj-learn-more: Support includes assistance with the Hajj system, creating Ministry-required packages, and reserving pilgrims. Includes up to 100 Hajj visa submissions. We also provide guidance through meetings, videos, and hands-on help.
pricing.season-support-umrah-learn-more: Get the support required to use the software efficiently. Our support includes meetings, connecting to your machine, videos, phone calls and up to 100 visas that we will issue on your behalf included in this plan.
ticker.default: Welcome to HAJonSoft — 4 Intelligent AI Agents for Saudi Arabia Visa Processing
introduction-to-hajonsoft-kea: The AI Agents Manager shell where you feed agents with traveller data, monitor their work, and receive responses in one guided workflow.
why.title: Why Choose HAJonSoft AI Agents?
why.subtitle: Trusted by travel agencies worldwide to automate their Saudi Arabia visa processing with intelligent AI Agents.
why.reason1.title: Fast & Reliable
why.reason1.description: Our AI Agents send traveller information to Saudi Arabia visa sites in seconds with automated passport reading and browser-based submission.
why.reason2.title: Secure & Accurate
why.reason2.description: Eliminate human errors with intelligent form filling, automatic photo resizing, and precise data submission to official Saudi Arabia systems.
why.reason3.title: Dedicated Support
why.reason3.description: Our team of industry experts provides hands-on support through meetings, video calls, and remote assistance.
why.reason4.title: Global Coverage
why.reason4.description: Serve clients across 40+ countries with multi-language support and timezone-aware AI Agent operations.
demo.title: See Our AI Agents in Action
demo.description: Watch how our AI Agents scan passports, fill visa forms automatically, and send traveller information to Saudi Arabia visa sites — all in one seamless workflow.
